name: Zach G.
one_line_review: "Excellent system and customer support to match"
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

I am thoroughly impressed with my journey with Synup so far. The customer service is extremely friendly, efficient and flexible; the onboarding process is effortless. The easy-to-use software has incredible functionality with business listing synchronisation and review generation technology being among the key features. The review generation system alone is fantastic! | have onboarded several clients onto the platform so far; they have all commented how they have long wished for a system like this. And as an agency owner, I can say the same myself - it has improved our relationships with our clients and helped us to add much more value to their experience. I cannot recommend Syup enough.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

Nothing worthy of note. There were a few teething problems to begin with but these were soon handled with the utmost professionalism and efficiency by the Synup customer support team. Every member of the Synup team that I have deal with has been incredibly professional, friendly, supportive and knowledgable. It is clear that the company values its clients very highly - from the top down!

‍

Recommendations to others considering Synup:

Synup makes it so easy to add measurable value to your customers' experience. It is a innovative platform run by a forward-thinking organisation

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

Getting information 'out there' in different places on the web. Also, gathering reviews - it is a fantastic system! Furthermore, the transparency with the effectiveness of the Synup platform in achieving the clients' objectives is a brilliant feature. This level of transparency helps to build further trust and validation from clients. They are now recommending the platform to their associates and contacts too!
